Package com.tngtech.archunit.library.freeze

package com.tngtech.archunit.library.freeze
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    com.tngtech.archunit.library
     
    com.tngtech.archunit.library.cycle_detection
     
    com.tngtech.archunit.library.dependencies
     
    com.tngtech.archunit.library.metrics
     
    com.tngtech.archunit.library.modules
     
  • Class
    Description
    FreezingArchRule
    A decorator around an existing ArchRule that "freezes" the state of all violations on the first call instead of failing the test.
    TextFileBasedViolationStore
    A text file based implementation of a ViolationStore.
    This ViolationStore will store the violations of every single FreezingArchRule in a dedicated file.
    It will keep an index of all stored rules as well as a mapping to the individual rule violation files in the same folder.
    By default, the layout within the configured store folder will look like:
    TextFileBasedViolationStore.RuleViolationFileNameStrategy
    Allows to adjust the rule violation file names of TextFileBasedViolationStore
    ViolationLineMatcher
    Allows FreezingArchRule to decide when two lines of two violations count as "equivalent".
    ViolationStore
    Provides some sort of storage for violations to FreezingArchRule.
    ViolationStore.Delegate
    A simple delegate for a ViolationStore to allow adjusting the behavior of another ViolationStore by delegation (e.g.
